data.title: Ethereum Flat After Pectra Upgrade, But Analyst Foresees Overhaul 'Tailwind' That Could Take ETH Above $2,000
data.description:
Ethereum's (CRYPTO: ETH) widely anticipated Pectra upgrade failed to have an immediate impact, with the second-largest cryptocurrency barely moving after its activation Wednesday.



What happened: ETH was up 0.96%, while trading volume rose scarcely by 0.52% over the last 24 hours.

data.title: Bob Iger Admits Marvel Lost Focus By Making Too Much Content, Saying 'Quantity Does Not Necessarily Beget Quality' — Here's What Disney Plans To Do Now
data.description: Disney CEO Bob Iger admitted Marvel lost focus by overproducing for streaming and announced a shift back to high-quality theatrical films like Thunderbolts to restore the franchise's strength and drive future growth.

data.title: Trump Tariff Pressure Reportedly Opens Global Doors For Elon Musk's Starlink As Nations Rush To Show 'Goodwill'
data.description: Countries facing U.S. tariffs are increasingly fast-tracking Elon Musk's Starlink approvals to smooth trade ties with the Trump administration, boosting SpaceX's global expansion and driving its massive valuation growth.

data.title: Cathie Wood Strengthens AI Chip Holdings With Nvidia And AMD Purchases, Reduces Palantir Position By Another $38.8 Million
data.description: On Wednesday, May 7, 2025, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Pours $24M Into Nvidia and AMD While Offloading $38.8M in Palantir Shares.

data.title: Bitcoin Taps $98,000, Ethereum, Dogecoin Steady As Fed Chair Jerome Powell Raises Trump Tariff-Induced Concerns: Analyst Says ETH Holding Above 'Crucial Level' And Begins Its 'Bounce Upwards'
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies traded sideways on Wednesday, as the Federal Reserve warned of macroeconomic dangers from President Donald Trump’s tariff moves.
